title: Recruiter Benchmark FAQ
summary: Recruiter benchmark guidance for keeping answers generic by default while using Singapore-first proof and phrasing when Singapore is explicitly asked.

verification.notes: User clarified the benchmark should be Singapore-first internally, but answers must not say Singapore unless the recruiter explicitly asks.

claims: Recruiter answers should stay generic unless Singapore is explicitly asked.
Country-specific work authorization or sponsorship should be confirmed directly rather than assumed.
Compensation answers should avoid unverified numbers or currency amounts.
Availability and notice period should be handled as separate recruiter answers.
Singapore-fit positioning can be supported with Maybank, Manulife, Mediacorp, Singapore Exchange, and Apple/Pixar-adjacent proof.
proof_points: User direction explicitly set the answer style to Singapore-first internally but generic outwardly unless asked.
Maybank-Ageas Etiqa provides 20x digital sales growth proof in Singapore.
Manulife provides Singapore-based APAC ML UX practice proof across 11 markets.
Mediacorp provides Singapore media and design-system scale proof across 30+ products.
Singapore Exchange and Apple/Pixar-adjacent work add local technical and spatial-computing credibility.
